required_education: Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field, completed or expected by the start date
responsibilities: Develop and debug embedded C firmware
Review code and document design decisions
Collaborate with electrical, systems, and verification engineers
work_authorization_requirements: Authorized to work in the United States
Immigration sponsorship unavailable now or in the future
requirements.requirement_notes: The degree may be completed by the start date; relocation is available and travel is under 10 percent.

critical_checks.description: Keep RTOS, Bluetooth, medical-device development, and IEC 62304 in the preferred category.
critical_checks.expected_behavior: Do not promote preferred qualifications into required skills.

critical_checks.description: Extract the explicitly bounded zero-to-two-year experience range.
critical_checks.expected_behavior: Set minimum years to 0 and maximum years to 2.
evidence_quotes: Zero to two years of internship, project, or professional experience.

critical_checks.description: Normalize the deadline and preserve the no-sponsorship rule.
critical_checks.expected_behavior: Return deadline 2026-08-15 and record sponsorship unavailable without inventing citizenship language.
evidence_quotes: We are unable to provide immigration sponsorship now or in the future.

known_traps.description: Expected degree completion by the start date is not the same as a degree already completed when applying.
forbidden_interpretations: Completed bachelor's degree required at application time

known_traps.description: IEC 62304 appears only under preferred qualifications.
